settings.text:
At Moon Ridge, style has never been limited to what you wear — it’s a way of living. The same spirit that shapes our hats, our travel stories, and the everyday Moon Ridge lifestyle naturally extends into the spaces we call home. Moon Ridge Home & Interiors is where that vision continues, bringing the character, warmth, and authenticity you see in our brand into interior design.

And just like we curate hats from the highest-quality, most trusted brands, we bring that same level of craftsmanship into the home. From furniture and textiles to art and décor, every product we recommend or source reflects the same standards our customers know from Moon Ridge: timeless quality, thoughtful design, and pieces that are made to last.

I’m Natalie Jo, and my approach to interiors starts with understanding you — your personality, your rhythm, and your story. Whether it’s a home, a business, or a special place in between, my goal is to create spaces that feel elevated, intentional, and deeply personal, embodying the heart of the Moon Ridge lifestyle.

I believe every space should feel special in a way that reflects the people who fill it. For me, design is more than selecting colors or arranging furniture — it’s about shaping an atmosphere that inspires, comforts, and feels unmistakably like home. I take the time to listen, understand your vision, and focus on the details that make a space come alive. My greatest measure of success is the moment a client walks into their finished space and lights up — because it feels perfectly theirs.

If you’re interested in home or office interior design, I’d love to connect.

Email me anytime at: natalie@moonridgecompany.com and let’s start designing a space that’s uniquely yours.
